_instructions.WHEN_TO_UPDATE: Update this file every Sunday evening before Monday's automated run.
_instructions.FORMAT: Numbers as plain numbers, text as shown (Rising/Stable/Falling).

SOURCES.pmi_manufacturing: S&P Global India PMI — Business Standard / ET on release day
SOURCES.housing_starts: Anarock / PropEquity quarterly. Enter Rising / Stable / Falling
SOURCES.earnings_growth: Nifty 50 PAT growth — Motilal Oswal / Kotak quarterly summary
SOURCES.unemployment_rate: CMIE monthly — check Economic Times / Mint
SOURCES.credit_growth: RBI WSS fortnightly — check rbi.org.in/WSS or ET
SOURCES.bank_npa_ratio: RBI FSR semi-annual — last published Dec 2024

credit_growth.source_note: RBI WSS — Non-food bank credit growth YoY
